headline: NetApp (NTAP) Gets A New 2x Long ETF For Short Term Stock Trades
summary: GraniteShares has launched the GraniteShares 2x Long NetApp ETF, offering leveraged daily exposure to NetApp stock. The ETF is designed to provide 2x the daily performance of NasdaqGS:NTAP shares. This new product adds an additional way for investors to trade short term moves in NetApp at a time when the stock is in focus. NetApp, traded as NasdaqGS:NTAP, now has a dedicated 2x Long ETF tracking its daily performance. This puts a spotlight on a stock that has already seen a 52.2% return...

headline: NetApp Acquires DataPelago, Making Data AI-Ready at the Infrastructure Layer
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., July 16, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced it has acquired DataPelago, a California-based AI data infrastructure company recognized for its innovative approach to eliminating data processing bottlenecks for AI and analytics workloads. headline: Liqid Names Daniel Berg Chief Product Officer
summary: WESTMINSTER, Colo., July 16, 2026--Liqid® (www.liqid.com), the global leader in software-defined memory and GPU pooling infrastructure, today announced the appointment of Daniel Berg as Chief Product Officer. Berg joins Liqid with more than three decades of product and engineering leadership, including executive roles at Gorilla Logic, JumpCloud, NetApp, Skype, and Sun Microsystems. headline: HPE's 42x Multiple Tells Only Half the Story
summary: The stock's price tag looks steep today, but the real question is what you are paying for the earnings expected two years from now.
